race.name: Bieg Lotników
race.tagline: Thirty kilometers through the Beskid Sądecki foothills — Poland's spa town classic where thermal springs meet frozen trails.

vitals.aid_stations: 3 feed stations with warm tea, energy bars, and Polish pastries

climate.description: February in the Beskid Sądecki brings reliable cold and decent snow cover. The spa town's sheltered valley position moderates extremes. Temperatures typically -8°C to -1°C. The region receives consistent snowfall from December through March.
challenges: Variable snow conditions in lower spa town sections
Fog can develop in valley sections during morning hours
Temperature inversions trap cold air in sheltered valleys
Late-season thaw risk at lower elevations

course.primary: Looped course through the forested hills surrounding Krynica-Zdrój, passing through mixed spruce and beech forest with rolling terrain typical of the Beskid Sądecki range. Several moderate climbs with rewarding descents back toward the spa town.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks through mountain forest terrain
course.grooming: Regional standard grooming with Polish ski club support
features: Historic spa town start and finish
Mixed forest skiing through spruce and beech
Views of the Beskid Sądecki mountain range
Named for Polish aviators — a local memorial tradition

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Solid regional event anchored by Krynica-Zdrój's spa town charm. Limited international visibility but strong local community. The Beskid Sądecki scenery and post-race thermal springs add unique character.

history.summary: Founded in 1985 as a tribute to Polish aviators, this race through the Beskid Sądecki hills has become a fixture of the Polish XC ski calendar. Krynica-Zdrój's status as Poland's premier mountain spa town gives the event a unique post-race recovery option. The race draws primarily from the southern Polish skiing community.
notable_facts: Named in honor of Polish aviators — a regional memorial tradition
Krynica-Zdrój is known as the 'Pearl of Polish Spas'
The Beskid Sądecki range offers some of Poland's most reliable natural snow
Post-race thermal spring soaks are a popular tradition among participants
One of several citizen ski races in Poland's southern mountain belt

youtube_data.search_query: Bieg Lotników cross country ski race Krynica-Zdrój

videos.title: RyterSKI zimą zaprasza!
videos.description: Nasz ośrodek to nie tylko miejsca hotelowe, to także stacja narciarska pośród malowniczych widoków. Serdecznie zapraszamy www.ryterski.pl

videos.title: XXXIII Bieszczadzki Bieg Lotników  9 luty 2020
videos.description: XXXIII Bieszczadzki Bieg Lotników odbył się w pięknej zimowej scenerii.Wzięło w nim udział przeszło 150 osób z całej Polski.Niektórzy byli zachwyceni tak dużą ilością śniegu, ponieważ jak sami mówili w rodzinnych stronach nie widzieli śniegu od dwóch lat.
videos.curation_reason: Race coverage of Bieg Lotników event with good duration and race-specific content showing winter conditions and participant experience.
